    cpu_status=$(check_cpu)
    if [ "$cpu_status" = "high" ]; then
        scale_up
    elif [ "$cpu_status" = "normal" ]; then
        scale_down
    fi
    sleep 60
done

スケーリングのベストプラクティス：

  • ステートレス設計: アプリケーションの状態を外部化
  • 負荷分散: nginx、HAProxyでの適切な負荷分散
  • データベース分散: マスター・スレーブ構成
  • セッション管理: Redis等での共有セッション
  • ヘルスチェック: 正常なインスタンスのみ負荷分散対象
  • 監視とメトリクス: パフォーマンス監視による自動スケーリング

9 実践的なDocker Compose構成例

実際のプロジェクトで使用される複雑なDocker Compose構成の実例を紹介します。

# LAMP スタック構成
version: '3.8'

services:
  # Apache + PHP
  web:
    build:
      context: ./docker/php
      dockerfile: Dockerfile
    volumes:
      - ./src:/var/www/html
      - ./docker/php/php.ini:/usr/local/etc/php/php.ini
    ports:
      - "80:80"
    depends_on:
      - db
    environment:
      - APACHE_DOCUMENT_ROOT=/var/www/html/public

  # MySQL Database
  db:
    image: mysql:8.0
    environment:
      MYSQL_ROOT_PASSWORD: rootpassword
      MYSQL_DATABASE: webapp
      MYSQL_USER: webuser
      MYSQL_PASSWORD: webpass
    volumes:
      - mysql_data:/var/lib/mysql
      - ./docker/mysql/init:/docker-entrypoint-initdb.d
    ports:
      - "3306:3306"

  # phpMyAdmin
  phpmyadmin:
    image: phpmyadmin:latest
    environment:
      PMA_HOST: db
      PMA_USER: webuser
      PMA_PASSWORD: webpass
    ports:
      - "8080:80"
    depends_on:
      - db

volumes:
  mysql_data:

# MEAN スタック構成
version: '3.8'

services:
  # Angular Frontend
  frontend:
    build:
      context: ./frontend
      dockerfile: Dockerfile
      target: production
    ports:
      - "80:80"
    depends_on:
      - backend

  # Express.js Backend
  backend:
    build: ./backend
    ports:
      - "3000:3000"
    environment:
      - NODE_ENV=production
      - MONGODB_URI=mongodb://db:27017/meanapp
      - JWT_SECRET=your-secret-key
    depends_on:
      - db
    volumes:
      - ./backend/uploads:/app/uploads

  # MongoDB
  db:
    image: mongo:5.0
    environment:
      MONGO_INITDB_ROOT_USERNAME: admin
      MONGO_INITDB_ROOT_PASSWORD: password
      MONGO_INITDB_DATABASE: meanapp
    volumes:
      - mongodb_data:/data/db
      - ./docker/mongo/init:/docker-entrypoint-initdb.d
    ports:
      - "27017:27017"

  # MongoDB Express (管理ツール)
  mongo-express:
    image: mongo-express:latest
    environment:
      ME_CONFIG_MONGODB_ADMINUSERNAME: admin
      ME_CONFIG_MONGODB_ADMINPASSWORD: password
      ME_CONFIG_MONGODB_SERVER: db
    ports:
      - "8081:8081"
    depends_on:
      - db

volumes:
  mongodb_data:

# Django + PostgreSQL + Redis構成
version: '3.8'

services:
  # Django Web Application
  web:
    build: .
    command: >
      sh -c "python manage.py migrate &&
             python manage.py collectstatic --noinput &&
             gunicorn myproject.wsgi:application --bind 0.0.0.0:8000"
    volumes:
      - static_volume:/app/staticfiles
      - media_volume:/app/mediafiles
    expose:
      - "8000"
    environment:
      - DEBUG=False
      - DATABASE_URL=postgresql://postgres:password@db:5432/myproject
      - REDIS_URL=redis://redis:6379/0
    depends_on:
      - db
      - redis

  # Nginx Reverse Proxy
  nginx:
    image: nginx:alpine
    ports:
      - "80:80"
      - "443:443"
    volumes:
      - ./nginx/nginx.conf:/etc/nginx/nginx.conf
      - ./nginx/ssl:/etc/nginx/ssl
      - static_volume:/app/staticfiles
      - media_volume:/app/mediafiles
    depends_on:
      - web

  # PostgreSQL Database
  db:
    image: postgres:13
    environment:
      POSTGRES_DB: myproject
      POSTGRES_USER: postgres
      POSTGRES_PASSWORD: password
    volumes:
      - postgres_data:/var/lib/postgresql/data
    healthcheck:
      test: ["CMD-SHELL", "pg_isready -U postgres"]
      interval: 30s
      timeout: 10s
      retries: 5

  # Redis Cache
  redis:
    image: redis:alpine
    command: redis-server --appendonly yes
    volumes:
      - redis_data:/data

  # Celery Worker
  celery:
    build: .
    command: celery -A myproject worker -l info
    volumes:
      - media_volume:/app/mediafiles
    environment:
      - DATABASE_URL=postgresql://postgres:password@db:5432/myproject
      - REDIS_URL=redis://redis:6379/0
    depends_on:
      - db
      - redis

  # Celery Beat Scheduler
  celery-beat:
    build: .
    command: celery -A myproject beat -l info
    environment:
      - DATABASE_URL=postgresql://postgres:password@db:5432/myproject
      - REDIS_URL=redis://redis:6379/0
    depends_on:
      - db
      - redis

  # Flower (Celery監視)
  flower:
    build: .
    command: celery -A myproject flower
    environment:
      - REDIS_URL=redis://redis:6379/0
    ports:
      - "5555:5555"
    depends_on:
      - redis

volumes:
  postgres_data:
  redis_data:
  static_volume:
  media_volume:

# マイクロサービス E-commerce構成
version: '3.8'

services:
  # API Gateway
  api-gateway:
    build: ./api-gateway
    ports:
      - "80:80"
    environment:
      - USER_SERVICE_URL=http://user-service:3001
      - PRODUCT_SERVICE_URL=http://product-service:3002
      - ORDER_SERVICE_URL=http://order-service:3003
      - PAYMENT_SERVICE_URL=http://payment-service:3004
    depends_on:
      - user-service
      - product-service
      - order-service
      - payment-service

  # User Service
  user-service:
    build: ./services/user-service
    environment:
      - DB_HOST=user-db
      - DB_NAME=users
      - JWT_SECRET=user-jwt-secret
      - REDIS_URL=redis://redis:6379/1
    depends_on:
      - user-db
      - redis

  # Product Service
  product-service:
    build: ./services/product-service
    environment:
      - DB_HOST=product-db
      - DB
      - NODE_ENV=${NODE_ENV:?NODE_ENV is required}
      - PORT=${PORT:-3000}
      - DB_HOST=${DB_HOST:?Database host must be specified}
      - DB_PASSWORD=${DB_PASSWORD:?Database password is required}
      - OPTIONAL_FEATURE=${OPTIONAL_FEATURE:-false}

# テンプレート化された設定
version: '3.8'

services:
  web:
    image: nginx:alpine
    ports:
      - "${WEB_PORT:-80}:80"
    volumes:
      - ./templates/nginx.conf.template:/etc/nginx/templates/nginx.conf.template
    environment:
      - NGINX_HOST=${NGINX_HOST:-localhost}
      - NGINX_PORT=${NGINX_PORT:-80}
      - BACKEND_HOST=${BACKEND_HOST:-app}
      - BACKEND_PORT=${BACKEND_PORT:-3000}

  app:
    build: .
    environment:
      - NODE_ENV=${NODE_ENV:-production}
      - DATABASE_URL=postgresql://${DB_USER}:${DB_PASSWORD}@${DB_HOST}:${DB_PORT}/${DB_NAME}
      - REDIS_URL=redis://${REDIS_HOST}:${REDIS_PORT}
    depends_on:
      - db
      - redis

  db:
    image: postgres:13
    environment:
      POSTGRES_DB: ${DB_NAME}
      POSTGRES_USER: ${DB_USER}
      POSTGRES_PASSWORD: ${DB_PASSWORD}

  redis:
    image: redis:alpine
    command: redis-server --requirepass ${REDIS_PASSWORD}

環境変数管理のベストプラクティス：

  • 環境ファイル分離: 環境別の設定ファイル使用
  • デフォルト値設定: ${VAR:-default}構文の活用
  • 必須変数検証: ${VAR:?error}で必須項目チェック
  • 機密情報管理: Docker Secretsやvaultツール使用
  • テンプレート化: 動的設定生成
  • 環境分離: プロファイルやオーバーライドファイル活用

7 依存関係と起動順序制御

サービス間の依存関係を適切に管理し、起動順序を制御する方法について説明します。

# 基本的な依存関係設定
version: '3.8'

services:
  web:
    image: nginx:alpine
    depends_on:
      - app
    ports:
      - "80:80"

  app:
    build: .
    depends_on:
      - db
      - redis
    environment:
      - DB_HOST=db
      - REDIS_HOST=redis

  db:
    image: postgres:13
    environment:
      POSTGRES_DB: myapp
      POSTGRES_USER: user
      POSTGRES_PASSWORD: password

  redis:
    image: redis:alpine

# 条件付き依存関係（ヘルスチェック）
version: '3.8'

services:
  web:
    image: nginx:alpine
    depends_on:
      app:
        condition: service_healthy
    ports:
      - "80:80"

  app:
    build: .
    depends_on:
      db:
        condition: service_healthy
      redis:
        condition: service_started
    healthcheck:
      test: ["CMD", "curl", "-f", "http://localhost:3000/health"]
      interval: 30s
      timeout: 10s
      retries: 3
      start_period: 40s

  db:
    image: postgres:13
    environment:
      POSTGRES_DB: myapp
      POSTGRES_USER: user
      POSTGRES_PASSWORD: password
    healthcheck:
      test: ["CMD-SHELL", "pg_isready -U user -d myapp"]
      interval: 30s
      timeout: 10s
      retries: 5
      start_period: 30s

  redis:
    image: redis:alpine
    healthcheck:
      test: ["CMD", "redis-cli", "ping"]
      interval: 30s
      timeout: 3s
      retries: 3

# 複雑な依存関係管理
version: '3.8'

services:
  # ロードバランサー
  loadbalancer:
    image: nginx:alpine
    depends_on:
      web1:
        condition: service_healthy
      web2:
        condition: service_healthy
    ports:
      - "80:80"

  # Webサーバー群
  web1:
    build: .
    depends_on:
      app:
        condition: service_healthy
    healthcheck:
      test: ["CMD", "curl", "-f", "http://localhost/health"]
      interval: 15s
      timeout: 5s
      retries: 3

  web2:
    build: .
    depends_on:
      app:
        condition: service_healthy
    healthcheck:
      test: ["CMD", "curl", "-f", "http://localhost/health"]
      interval: 15s
      timeout: 5s
      retries: 3

  # アプリケーションサーバー
  app:
    build: ./app
    depends_on:
      db:
        condition: service_healthy
      cache:
        condition: service_healthy
      migration:
        condition: service_completed_successfully
    healthcheck:
      test: ["CMD", "curl", "-f", "http://localhost:3000/api/health"]
      interval: 30s
      timeout: 10s
      retries: 3
      start_period: 60s

  # データベースマイグレーション
  migration:
    build: ./app
    command: npm run migrate
    depends_on:
      db:
        condition: service_healthy
    restart: "no"

  # データベース
  db:
    image: postgres:13
    environment:
      POSTGRES_DB: myapp
      POSTGRES_USER: user
      POSTGRES_PASSWORD: password
    volumes:
      - db_data:/var/lib/postgresql/data
    healthcheck:
      test: ["CMD-SHELL", "pg_isready -U user -d myapp"]
      interval: 30s
      timeout: 10s
      retries: 5
      start_period: 30s

  # キャッシュサーバー
  cache:
    image: redis:alpine
    healthcheck:
      test: ["CMD", "redis-cli", "ping"]
      interval: 30s
      timeout: 3s
      retries: 3

volumes:
  db_data:

# 初期化コンテナパターン
version: '3.8'

services:
  # データベース初期化
  db-init:
    image: postgres:13
    command: >
      bash -c "
        until pg_isready -h db -p 5432 -U user; do
          echo 'Waiting for database...'
          sleep 2
        done
        psql -h db -U user -d myapp -c 'CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS users (id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY, name VARCHAR(100));'
      "
    depends_on:
      - db
    restart: "no"

  # アプリケーション初期化
  app-init:
    build: .
    command: npm run seed
    depends_on:
      db-init:
        condition: service_completed_successfully
    restart: "no"

  # メインアプリケーション
  app:
    build: .
    depends_on:
      app-init:
        condition: service_completed_successfully
    ports:
      - "3000:3000"

  db:
    image: postgres:13
    environment:
      POSTGRES_DB: myapp
      POSTGRES_USER: user
      POSTGRES_PASSWORD: password

# 外部サービス依存関係
version: '3.8'

services:
  app:
    build: .
    depends_on:
      - db
      - external-service-check
    environment:
      - EXTERNAL_API_URL=https://api.external.com

  db:
    image: postgres:13
    environment:
      POSTGRES_DB: myapp
      POSTGRES_USER: user
      POSTGRES_PASSWORD: password

  # 外部サービスの可用性チェック
  external-service-check:
    image: alpine:latest
    command: >
      sh -c "
        apk add --no-cache curl
        until curl -f https://api.external.com/health; do
          echo 'Waiting for external service...'
          sleep 5
        done
        echo 'External service is available'
      "
    restart: "no"

# カスタム起動スクリプト
version: '3.8'

services:
  app:
    build: .
    command: >
      sh -c "
        echo 'Waiting for dependencies...'
        until nc -z db 5432; do
          echo 'Database not ready, waiting...'
          sleep 2
        done
        until nc -z redis 6379; do
          echo 'Redis not ready, waiting...'
          sleep 2
        done
        echo 'Starting application...'
        npm start
      "
    depends_on:
      - db
      - redis

  db:
    image: postgres:13
    environment:
      POSTGRES_DB: myapp
      POSTGRES_USER: user
      POSTGRES_PASSWORD: password

  redis:
    image: redis:alpine

# 段階的起動パターン
version: '3.8'

services:
  # Phase 1: Infrastructure
  db:
    image: postgres:13
    environment:
      POSTGRES_DB: myapp
      POSTGRES_USER: user
      POSTGRES_PASSWORD: password
    healthcheck:
      test: ["CMD-SHELL", "pg_isready -U user -d myapp"]
      interval: 30s
      timeout: 10s
      retries: 5

  redis:
    image: redis:alpine
    healthcheck:
      test: ["CMD", "redis-cli", "ping"]
      interval: 30s
      timeout: 3s
      retries: 3

  # Phase 2: Core Services
  auth-service:
    build: ./auth-service
    depends_on:
      db:
        condition: service_healthy
      redis:
        condition: service_healthy
    healthcheck:
      test: ["CMD", "curl", "-f", "http://localhost:3001/health"]
      interval: 30s
      timeout: 5s
      retries: 3

  user-service:
    build: ./user-service
    depends_on:
      db:
        condition: service_healthy
      auth-service:
        condition: service_healthy
    healthcheck:
      test: ["CMD", "curl", "-f", "http://localhost:3002/health"]
      interval: 30s
      timeout: 5s
      retries: 3

  # Phase 3: Application Services
  api-gateway:
    build: ./api-gateway
    depends_on:
      auth-service:
        condition: service_healthy
      user-service:
        condition: service_healthy
    ports:
      - "80:80"

依存関係管理のポイント：

  • depends_on: 基本的な起動順序制御
  • ヘルスチェック: サービスの実際の準備状況確認
  • condition指定: 詳細な依存条件設定
  • 初期化コンテナ: データベース初期化等の前処理
  • 段階的起動: 複雑なシステムの順次起動
  • 外部依存: 外部サービスの可用性確認

8 スケーリングと負荷分散

Docker Composeでのサービススケーリングと負荷分散の設定方法を学びます。

# 基本的なスケーリング
version: '3.8'

services:
  web:
    build: .
    ports:
      - "3000-3010:3000"  # ポート範囲指定
    depends_on:
      - db

  db:
    image: postgres:13
    environment:
      POSTGRES_DB: myapp
      POSTGRES_USER: user
      POSTGRES_PASSWORD: password

# スケーリングコマンド例：
# docker-compose up -d --scale web=5
# 5つのwebサービスインスタンスが起動

# nginx負荷分散設定
version: '3.8'

services:
  loadbalancer:
    image: nginx:alpine
    ports:
      - "80:80"
    volumes:
      - ./nginx.conf:/etc/nginx/nginx.conf
    depends_on:
      - web

  web:
    build: .
    expose:
      - "3000"
    depends_on:
      - db
    deploy:
      replicas: 3

  db:
    image: postgres:13
    environment:
      POSTGRES_DB: myapp
      POSTGRES_USER: user
      POSTGRES_PASSWORD: password

# nginx.conf の設定例
upstream backend {
    server web_web_1:3000;
    server web_web_2:3000;
    server web_web_3:3000;
}

server {
    listen 80;
    location / {
        proxy_pass http://backend;
        proxy_set_header Host $host;
        proxy_set_header X-Real-IP $remote_addr;
    }
}

# 動的負荷分散（Dockergen使用）
version: '3.8'

services:
  nginx:
    image: nginx:alpine
    ports:
      - "80:80"
    volumes:
      - nginx_conf:/etc/nginx/conf.d
    depends_on:
      - dockergen

  dockergen:
    image: jwilder/docker-gen
    volumes:
      - /var/run/docker.sock:/tmp/docker.sock:ro
      - ./nginx.tmpl:/etc/docker-gen/templates/nginx.tmpl
      - nginx_conf:/etc/nginx/conf.d
    command: -notify-sighup nginx -wait 5s:30s /etc/docker-gen/templates/nginx.tmpl /etc/nginx/conf.d/default.conf

  web:
    build: .
    expose:
      - "3000"
    environment:
      - VIRTUAL_HOST=myapp.local
    depends_on:
      - db

  db:
    image: postgres:13
    environment:
      POSTGRES_DB: myapp
      POSTGRES_USER: user
      POSTGRES_PASSWORD: password

volumes:
  nginx_conf:

# HAProxy負荷分散
version: '3.8'

services:
  haproxy:
    image: haproxy:alpine
    ports:
      - "80:80"
      - "8404:8404"  # 統計ページ
    volumes:
      - ./haproxy.cfg:/usr/local/etc/haproxy/haproxy.cfg
    depends_on:
      - web

  web:
    build: .
    expose:
      - "3000"
    depends_on:
      - db

  db:
    image: postgres:13
    environment:
      POSTGRES_DB: myapp
      POSTGRES_USER: user
      POSTGRES_PASSWORD: password

# haproxy.cfg の設定例
global
    stats socket /var/run/api.sock user haproxy group haproxy mode 660 level admin

defaults
    mode http
    timeout connect 5000ms
    timeout client 50000ms
    timeout server 50000ms

frontend web_frontend
    bind *:80
    default_backend web_servers

backend web_servers
    balance roundrobin
    server web1 web_web_1:3000 check
    server web2 web_web_2:3000 check
    server web3 web_web_3:3000 check

listen stats
    bind *:8404
    stats enable
    stats uri /stats

# 分散データベース構成
version: '3.8'

services:
  # 読み書き用マスターDB
  db-master:
    image: postgres:13
    environment:
      POSTGRES_DB: myapp
      POSTGRES_USER: user
      POSTGRES_PASSWORD: password
      POSTGRES_REPLICATION_USER: replicator
      POSTGRES_REPLICATION_PASSWORD: replicator_password
    volumes:
      - master_data:/var/lib/postgresql/data
      - ./pg-master.conf:/etc/postgresql/postgresql.conf
    command: postgres -c config_file=/etc/postgresql/postgresql.conf

  # 読み取り専用スレーブDB
  db-slave1:
    image: postgres:13
    environment:
      POSTGRES_MASTER_SERVICE: db-master
      POSTGRES_REPLICATION_USER: replicator
      POSTGRES_REPLICATION_PASSWORD: replicator_password
    volumes:
      - slave1_data:/var/lib/postgresql/data
    depends_on:
      - db-master

  db-slave2:
    image: postgres:13
    environment:
      POSTGRES_MASTER_SERVICE: db-master
      POSTGRES_REPLICATION_USER: replicator
      POSTGRES_REPLICATION_PASSWORD: replicator_password
    volumes:
      - slave2_data:/var/lib/postgresql/data
    depends_on:
      - db-master

  # アプリケーション（読み書き用）
  app-write:
    build: .
    environment:
      - DB_WRITE_HOST=db-master
      - DB_READ_HOSTS=db-slave1,db-slave2
    depends_on:
      - db-master
      - db-slave1
      - db-slave2

  # アプリケーション（読み取り専用）
  app-read:
    build: .
    environment:
      - DB_READ_HOSTS=db-slave1,db-slave2
      - READ_ONLY=true
    depends_on:
      - db-slave1
      - db-slave2

volumes:
  master_data:
  slave1_data:
  slave2_data:

# Redis クラスタ構成
version: '3.8'

services:
  redis-master:
    image: redis:alpine
    command: redis-server --appendonly yes
    volumes:
      - redis_master_data:/data

  redis-slave1:
    image: redis:alpine
    command: redis-server --slaveof redis-master 6379 --appendonly yes
    volumes:
      - redis_slave1_data:/data
    depends_on:

  redis-slave2:

    command: redis-server --slaveof redis-master 6379 --appendonly yes
    volumes:
      - redis_slave2_data:/data
    depends_on:

  redis-sentinel1:
    image: redis:alpine
    command: redis-sentinel /etc/redis/sentinel.conf
    volumes:
      - ./sentinel.conf:/etc/redis/sentinel.conf
    depends_on:
      - redis-master

  redis-sentinel2:
    image: redis:alpine
    command: redis-sentinel /etc/redis/sentinel.conf
    volumes:
      - ./sentinel.conf:/etc/redis/sentinel.conf
    depends_on:
      - redis-master

  redis-sentinel3:
    image: redis:alpine
    command: redis-sentinel /etc/redis/sentinel.conf
    volumes:
      - ./sentinel.conf:/etc/redis/sentinel.conf
    depends_on:
      - redis-master

volumes:
  redis_master_data:
  redis_slave1_data:
  redis_slave2_data:

# マイクロサービススケーリング
version: '3.8'

services:
  api-gateway:
    image: nginx:alpine
    ports:
      - "80:80"
    volumes:
      - ./nginx-gateway.conf:/etc/nginx/nginx.conf
    depends_on:
      - user-service
      - order-service
      - inventory-service

  user-service:
    build: ./user-service
    expose:
      - "3001"
    depends_on:
      - user-db
    deploy:
      replicas: 3

  order-service:
    build: ./order-service
    expose:
      - "3002"
    depends_on:
      - order-db
    deploy:
      replicas: 2

  inventory-service:
    build: ./inventory-service
    expose:
      - "3003"
    depends_on:
      - inventory-db
    deploy:
      replicas: 2

  user-db:
    image: postgres:13
    environment:
      POSTGRES_DB: users
      POSTGRES_USER: user
      POSTGRES_PASSWORD: password

  order-db:
    image: postgres:13
    environment:
      POSTGRES_DB: orders
      POSTGRES_USER: user
      POSTGRES_PASSWORD: password

  inventory-db:
    image: postgres:13
    environment:
      POSTGRES_DB: inventory
      POSTGRES_USER: user
      POSTGRES_PASSWORD: password

# 自動スケーリングスクリプト例
#!/bin/bash

# CPU使用率チェック
check_cpu() {
    docker stats --no-stream --format "{{.CPUPerc}}" | sed 's/%//' | awk '{if($1>80) print "high"; else print "normal"}'
}

# スケールアップ
scale_up() {
    current_scale=$(docker-compose ps -q web | wc -l)
    new_scale=$((current_scale + 1))
    docker-compose up -d --scale web=$new_scale
    echo "Scaled up to $new_scale instances"
}

# スケールダウン
scale_down() {
    current_scale=$(docker-compose ps -q web | wc -l)
    if [ $current_scale -gt 1 ]; then
        new_scale=$((current_scale - 1))
        docker-compose up -d --scale web=$new_scale
        echo "Scaled down to $new_scale instances"
    fi
}

# メインループ
while true; do
    cpu_status=$(check_cpu)
    if [ "$cpu_status" = "high" ]; then
        scale_up
    elif [ "$cpu_status" = "normal" ]; then
        scale_down
    fi
    sleep 60
done

スケーリングのベストプラクティス：

  • ステートレス設計: アプリケーションの状態を外部化
  • 負荷分散: nginx、HAProxyでの適切な負荷分散
  • データベース分散: マスター・スレーブ構成
  • セッション管理: Redis等での共有セッション
  • ヘルスチェック: 正常なインスタンスのみ負荷分散対象
  • 監視とメトリクス: パフォーマンス監視による自動スケーリング

9 実践的なDocker Compose構成例

実際のプロジェクトで使用される複雑なDocker Compose構成の実例を紹介します。

# LAMP スタック構成
version: '3.8'

services:
  # Apache + PHP
  web:
    build:
      context: ./docker/php
      dockerfile: Dockerfile
    volumes:
      - ./src:/var/www/html
      - ./docker/php/php.ini:/usr/local/etc/php/php.ini
    ports:
      - "80:80"
    depends_on:
      - db
    environment:
      - APACHE_DOCUMENT_ROOT=/var/www/html/public

  # MySQL Database
  db:
    image: mysql:8.0
    environment:
      MYSQL_ROOT_PASSWORD: rootpassword
      MYSQL_DATABASE: webapp
      MYSQL_USER: webuser
      MYSQL_PASSWORD: webpass
    volumes:
      - mysql_data:/var/lib/mysql
      - ./docker/mysql/init:/docker-entrypoint-initdb.d
    ports:
      - "3306:3306"

  # phpMyAdmin
  phpmyadmin:
    image: phpmyadmin:latest
    environment:
      PMA_HOST: db
      PMA_USER: webuser
      PMA_PASSWORD: webpass
    ports:
      - "8080:80"
    depends_on:
      - db

volumes:
  mysql_data:

# MEAN スタック構成
version: '3.8'

services:
  # Angular Frontend
  frontend:
    build:
      context: ./frontend
      dockerfile: Dockerfile
      target: production
    ports:
      - "80:80"
    depends_on:
      - backend

  # Express.js Backend
  backend:
    build: ./backend
    ports:
      - "3000:3000"
    environment:
      - NODE_ENV=production
      - MONGODB_URI=mongodb://db:27017/meanapp
      - JWT_SECRET=your-secret-key
    depends_on:
      - db
    volumes:
      - ./backend/uploads:/app/uploads

  # MongoDB
  db:
    image: mongo:5.0
    environment:
      MONGO_INITDB_ROOT_USERNAME: admin
      MONGO_INITDB_ROOT_PASSWORD: password
      MONGO_INITDB_DATABASE: meanapp
    volumes:
      - mongodb_data:/data/db
      - ./docker/mongo/init:/docker-entrypoint-initdb.d
    ports:
      - "27017:27017"

  # MongoDB Express (管理ツール)
  mongo-express:
    image: mongo-express:latest
    environment:
      ME_CONFIG_MONGODB_ADMINUSERNAME: admin
      ME_CONFIG_MONGODB_ADMINPASSWORD: password
      ME_CONFIG_MONGODB_SERVER: db
    ports:
      - "8081:8081"
    depends_on:
      - db

volumes:
  mongodb_data:

# Django + PostgreSQL + Redis構成
version: '3.8'

services:
  # Django Web Application
  web:
    build: .
    command: >
      sh -c "python manage.py migrate &&
             python manage.py collectstatic --noinput &&
             gunicorn myproject.wsgi:application --bind 0.0.0.0:8000"
    volumes:
      - static_volume:/app/staticfiles
      - media_volume:/app/mediafiles
    expose:
      - "8000"
    environment:
      - DEBUG=False
      - DATABASE_URL=postgresql://postgres:password@db:5432/myproject
      - REDIS_URL=redis://redis:6379/0
    depends_on:
      - db
      - redis

  # Nginx Reverse Proxy
  nginx:
    image: nginx:alpine
    ports:
      - "80:80"
      - "443:443"
    volumes:
      - ./nginx/nginx.conf:/etc/nginx/nginx.conf
      - ./nginx/ssl:/etc/nginx/ssl
      - static_volume:/app/staticfiles
      - media_volume:/app/mediafiles
    depends_on:
      - web

  # PostgreSQL Database
  db:
    image: postgres:13
    environment:
      POSTGRES_DB: myproject
      POSTGRES_USER: postgres
      POSTGRES_PASSWORD: password
    volumes:
      - postgres_data:/var/lib/postgresql/data
    healthcheck:
      test: ["CMD-SHELL", "pg_isready -U postgres"]
      interval: 30s
      timeout: 10s
      retries: 5

  # Redis Cache
  redis:
    image: redis:alpine
    command: redis-server --appendonly yes
    volumes:
      - redis_data:/data

  # Celery Worker
  celery:
    build: .
    command: celery -A myproject worker -l info
    volumes:
      - media_volume:/app/mediafiles
    environment:
      - DATABASE_URL=postgresql://postgres:password@db:5432/myproject
      - REDIS_URL=redis://redis:6379/0
    depends_on:
      - db
      - redis

  # Celery Beat Scheduler
  celery-beat:
    build: .
    command: celery -A myproject beat -l info
    environment:
      - DATABASE_URL=postgresql://postgres:password@db:5432/myproject
      - REDIS_URL=redis://redis:6379/0
    depends_on:
      - db
      - redis

  # Flower (Celery監視)
  flower:
    build: .
    command: celery -A myproject flower
    environment:
      - REDIS_URL=redis://redis:6379/0
    ports:
      - "5555:5555"
    depends_on:
      - redis

volumes:
  postgres_data:
  redis_data:
  static_volume:
  media_volume:

# マイクロサービス E-commerce構成
version: '3.8'

services:
  # API Gateway
  api-gateway:
    build: ./api-gateway
    ports:
      - "80:80"
    environment:
      - USER_SERVICE_URL=http://user-service:3001
      - PRODUCT_SERVICE_URL=http://product-service:3002
      - ORDER_SERVICE_URL=http://order-service:3003
      - PAYMENT_SERVICE_URL=http://payment-service:3004
    depends_on:
      - user-service
      - product-service
      - order-service
      - payment-service

  # User Service
  user-service:
    build: ./services/user-service
    environment:
      - DB_HOST=user-db
      - DB_NAME=users
      - JWT_SECRET=user-jwt-secret
      - REDIS_URL=redis://redis:6379/1
    depends_on:
      - user-db
      - redis

  # Product Service
  product-service:
    build: ./services/product-service
    environment:
      - DB_HOST=product-db
      - DB_NAME=products
      - ELASTICSEARCH_URL=http://elasticsearch:9200
    depends_on:
      - product-db
      - elasticsearch

  # Order Service
  order-service:
    build: ./services/order-service
    environment:
      - DB_HOST=order-db
      - DB_NAME=orders
      - USER_SERVICE_URL=http://user-service:3001
      - PRODUCT_SERVICE_URL=http://product-service:3002
      - RABBITMQ_URL=amqp://rabbitmq:5672
    depends_on:
      - order-db
      - rabbitmq

  # Payment Service
  payment-service:
    build: ./services/payment-service
    environment:
      - DB_HOST=payment-db
      - DB_NAME=payments
      - STRIPE_SECRET_KEY=${STRIPE_SECRET_KEY}
      - RABBITMQ_URL=amqp://rabbitmq:5672
    depends_on:
      - payment-db
      - rabbitmq

  # Databases
  user-db:
    image: postgres:13
    environment:
      POSTGRES_DB: users
      POSTGRES_USER: user
      POSTGRES_PASSWORD: password
    volumes:
      - user_db_data:/var/lib/postgresql/data

  product-db:
    image: postgres:13
    environment:
      POSTGRES_DB: products
      POSTGRES_USER: user
      POSTGRES_PASSWORD: password
    volumes:
      - product_db_data:/var/lib/postgresql/data

  order-db:
    image: postgres:13
    environment:
      POSTGRES_DB: orders
      POSTGRES_USER: user
      POSTGRES_PASSWORD: password
    volumes:
      - order_db_data:/var/lib/postgresql/data

  payment-db:
    image: postgres:13
    environment:
      POSTGRES_DB: payments
      POSTGRES_USER: user
      POSTGRES_PASSWORD: password
    volumes:
      - payment_db_data:/var/lib/postgresql/data

  # Redis Cache
  redis:
    image: redis:alpine
    volumes:
      - redis_data:/data

  # Elasticsearch (商品検索)
  elasticsearch:
    image: elasticsearch:7.17.0
    environment:
      - discovery.type=single-node
      - "ES_JAVA_OPTS=-Xms512m -Xmx512m"
    volumes:
      - elasticsearch_data:/usr/share/elasticsearch/data

  # RabbitMQ (メッセージキュー)
  rabbitmq:
    image: rabbitmq:3-management
    environment:
      RABBITMQ_DEFAULT_USER: admin
      RABBITMQ_DEFAULT_PASS: password
    ports:
      - "15672:15672"  # 管理UI
    volumes:
      - rabbitmq_data:/var/lib/rabbitmq

  # 監視とログ
  prometheus:
    image: prom/prometheus
    ports:
      - "9090:9090"
    volumes:
      - ./prometheus.yml:/etc/prometheus/prometheus.yml
      - prometheus_data:/prometheus

  grafana:
    image: grafana/grafana
    ports:
      - "3000:3000"
    environment:
      - GF_SECURITY_ADMIN_PASSWORD=admin
    volumes:
      - grafana_data:/var/lib/grafana

volumes:
  user_db_data:
  product_db_data:
  order_db_data:
  payment_db_data:
  redis_data:
  elasticsearch_data:
  rabbitmq_data:
  prometheus_data:
  grafana_data:

# WordPress マルチサイト構成
version: '3.8'

services:
  # Nginx Reverse Proxy
  nginx:
    image: nginx:alpine
    ports:
      - "80:80"
      - "443:443"
    volumes:
      - ./nginx/conf.d:/etc/nginx/conf.d
      - ./nginx/ssl:/etc/nginx/ssl

    depends_on:

      - wordpress_data:/var/www/html

  # MariaDB

# CI/CD パイプライン構成
version: '3.8'

services:
  # Jenkins CI/CD
  jenkins:
    image: jenkins/jenkins:lts
    ports:
      - "8080:8080"
      - "50000:50000"
    volumes:
      - jenkins_data:/var/jenkins_home
      - /var/run/docker.sock:/var/run/docker.sock
    environment:
      - JAVA_OPTS=-Djenkins.install.runSetupWizard=false

  # GitLab CE
  gitlab:
    image: gitlab/gitlab-ce:latest
    hostname: 'gitlab.local'
    ports:
      - "443:443"
      - "80:80"
      - "22:22"
    volumes:
      - gitlab_config:/etc/gitlab
      - gitlab_logs:/var/log/gitlab
      - gitlab_data:/var/opt/gitlab
    environment:
      GITLAB_OMNIBUS_CONFIG: |
        external_url 'http://gitlab.local'
        gitlab_rails['gitlab_shell_ssh_port'] = 22

  # SonarQube (コード品質チェック)
  sonarqube:
    image: sonarqube:community
    ports:
      - "9000:9000"
    environment:
      - SONAR_JDBC_URL=jdbc:postgresql://sonar-db:5432/sonar
      - SONAR_JDBC_USERNAME=sonar
      - SONAR_JDBC_PASSWORD=sonar
    volumes:
      - sonarqube_data:/opt/sonarqube/data
      - sonarqube_extensions:/opt/sonarqube/extensions
      - sonarqube_logs:/opt/sonarqube/logs
    depends_on:
      - sonar-db

  sonar-db:
    image: postgres:13
    environment:
      POSTGRES_USER: sonar
      POSTGRES_PASSWORD: sonar
      POSTGRES_DB: sonar
    volumes:
      - sonar_db_data:/var/lib/postgresql/data

  # Nexus Repository Manager
  nexus:
    image: sonatype/nexus3
    ports:
      - "8081:8081"
    volumes:
      - nexus_data:/nexus-data

  # Docker Registry
  registry:
    image: registry:2
    ports:
      - "5000:5000"
    volumes:
      - registry_data:/var/lib/registry
    environment:
      REGISTRY_STORAGE_FILESYSTEM_ROOTDIRECTORY: /var/lib/registry

volumes:
  jenkins_data:
  gitlab_config:
  gitlab_logs:
  gitlab_data:
  sonarqube_data:
  sonarqube_extensions:
  sonarqube_logs:
  sonar_db_data:
  nexus_data:
  registry_data:

# Elasticsearch + Kibana + Logstash (ELK Stack)
version: '3.8'

services:
  # Elasticsearch
  elasticsearch:
    image: elasticsearch:7.17.0
    environment:
      - node.name=elasticsearch
      - cluster.name=docker-cluster
      - discovery.type=single-node
      - bootstrap.memory_lock=true
      - "ES_JAVA_OPTS=-Xms1g -Xmx1g"
    ulimits:
      memlock:
        soft: -1
        hard: -1
    volumes:
      - elasticsearch_data:/usr/share/elasticsearch/data
    ports:
      - "9200:9200"

  # Kibana
  kibana:
    image: kibana:7.17.0
    environment:
      ELASTICSEARCH_HOSTS: http://elasticsearch:9200
    ports:
      - "5601:5601"
    depends_on:
      - elasticsearch

  # Logstash
  logstash:
    image: logstash:7.17.0
    volumes:
      - ./logstash/pipeline:/usr/share/logstash/pipeline
      - ./logstash/config/logstash.yml:/usr/share/logstash/config/logstash.yml
    ports:
      - "5044:5044"
      - "9600:9600"
    depends_on:
      - elasticsearch

  # Filebeat (ログ収集)
  filebeat:
    image: elastic/filebeat:7.17.0
    user: root
    volumes:
      - ./filebeat/filebeat.yml:/usr/share/filebeat/filebeat.yml
      - /var/lib/docker/containers:/var/lib/docker/containers:ro
      - /var/run/docker.sock:/var/run/docker.sock:ro
    depends_on:
      - logstash

volumes:
  elasticsearch_data:

実践構成のポイント：

  • レイヤー分離: フロントエンド、バックエンド、データベースの明確な分離
  • サービス間通信: 適切なネットワーク設計とAPI通信
  • データ永続化: 各サービスのデータ保護
  • スケーラビリティ: 負荷に応じたサービス拡張
  • 監視とログ: 運用に必要な可視化ツール
  • セキュリティ: 適切なネットワーク分離と認証

10 まとめ

Docker Composeは、複数コンテナアプリケーションの定義・管理を簡単にする強力なツールです。基本的な構文から高度な運用パターンまで習得することで、効率的で保守性の高いコンテナ環境を構築できます。

重要なポイント:

  • 宣言的設定: YAML形式での分かりやすい設定管理
  • サービス管理: 複数コンテナの一括操作
  • ネットワーク構成: セキュアなサービス間通信
  • データ永続化: 適切なボリューム管理
  • 環境分離: 開発・テスト・本番環境の統一管理
  • スケーラビリティ: 負荷に応じたサービス拡張
  • 依存関係管理: 適切な起動順序制御

次のステップ:

  • Docker Swarm: クラスタ環境でのオーケストレーション
  • Kubernetes: より高度なコンテナオーケストレーション
  • CI/CD統合: 自動デプロイパイプライン
  • 監視とログ: 運用監視システムの構築
  • セキュリティ強化: コンテナセキュリティの実装
  • パフォーマンス最適化: 本番環境での性能向上
